2026-04-09T17:16:44.4767514Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-09T17:15:13.810266719Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58008,\"title\":\"[Identity] Docs: Update README to reflect TypeForwarding facade architecture in 1.53.0\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.Identity`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/`\\n**Triggered by:** PR #57200 by `@m-nash`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #57200 moved all `Azure.Identity` public types into `Azure.Core` and converted `Azure.Identity` into a lightweight `TypeForwardedTo` facade. A `MigrationGuide.md` was added to `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/` covering CS0433 upgrade scenarios. CHANGELOG entries were added but the main **README.md was not updated** to reflect this architectural change.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- The `README.md` still describes `Azure.Identity` as the home of the credential implementations, with no mention that types now live in `Azure.Core` and are type-forwarded\\n- No link to `MigrationGuide.md` anywhere in the README (e.g. under \\u0026#34;Getting started\\u0026#34;, \\u0026#34;Next steps\\u0026#34;, or a dedicated \\u0026#34;Upgrading\\u0026#34; section)\\n- The Azure.Core `README.md` key-concepts section lists `TokenCredentials` as an abstraction but never mentions that `DefaultAzureCredential` and all other credential types are now bundled in `Azure.Core` itself — users who read only the Azure.Core README have no way to discover this\\n- No note in the `Azure.Identity` README that consumers of `Azure.Core` 1.53+ no longer need a separate `Azure.Identity` package reference to use credentials\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n#### File 1: `sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/README.md` — **edit**\\n\\nAdd a callout near the top of the README (after the header links, before or at the start of **Getting started**) to inform users about the TypeForwarding change and point them to the migration guide:\\n\\n```markdown\\n\\u0026gt; **Note (v1.53.0+):** Starting with version 1.53.0, all `Azure.Identity` types have been consolidated into `Azure.Core` and are forwarded from this package using [`TypeForwardedTo`]((learn.microsoft.com/redacted) Existing code continues to compile and run without changes. If you encounter [CS0433]((learn.microsoft.com/redacted) errors after upgrading, see the [Migration Guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/MigrationGuide.md).\\n```\\n\\nAdditionally, add a link in the **Next steps** section:\\n\\n```markdown\\n- [Migration guide for Azure.Identity type consolidation into Azure.Core](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/MigrationGuide.md)\\n```\\n\\n#### File 2: `sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md` — **edit**\\n\\nIn the **Key concepts** section, update the bullet describing credential abstractions to note that credential implementations are now bundled in Azure.Core itself:\\n\\nReplace:\\n```markdown\\n- Abstractions for representing Azure SDK credentials. (`TokenCredentials`).\\n```\\n\\nWith:\\n```markdown\\n- Abstractions and implementations for authenticating Azure SDK clients (`TokenCredential`, `DefaultAzureCredential`, and all other credential types from `Azure.Identity` are now included in `Azure.Core` starting with version 1.53.0 — no separate `Azure.Identity` package reference is needed).\\n```\\n\\nAlso add a note to the **Getting started** section:\\n\\n```markdown\\n### Authentication\\n\\nStarting with `Azure.Core` 1.53.0, all authentication credential types (such as `DefaultAzureCredential`, `ClientSecretCredential`, `ManagedIdentityCredential`, etc.) are bundled directly in this package. A separate `Azure.Identity` reference is no longer required. If you are upgrading and encounter CS0433 errors, see the [Azure.Identity migration guide](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/MigrationGuide.md).\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nNo new snippet test files are required for these prose-only README additions. The existing credential usage snippets (e.g., `DefaultAzureCredential` in `sdk/core/Azure.Core/tests/`) already demonstrate credential usage.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nBoth READMEs already contain the required sections (Getting started, Key concepts, Examples, Troubleshooting, Next steps, Contributing). No structural additions are needed — only content updates within existing sections.\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 identity`\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 identity`\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/identity/Azure.Identity/`\\n\\nAnd for Azure.Core:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/core/Azure.Core/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/core/Azure.Core/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 core`\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt; [!TIP]\\n\\u0026gt; **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to have Copilot coding agent implement the changes described in the Implementation Guide above\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\u0026gt; Generated by [Update Docs](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/actions/runs/24202891168/agentic_workflow) · ● 612.2K · [◷](https://github.com/search?q=repo%3AAzure%2Fazure-sdk-for-net+is%3Aissue+%22gh-aw-workflow-call-id%3A+Azure%2Fazure-sdk-for-net%2Fupdate-samples-and-docs%22\\u0026amp;type=issues)\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58008\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"github-actions[bot]\",\"id\":41898282,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/apps/github-actions\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/in/15368?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":0,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":0},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-09T17:10:29Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-09T17:10:29Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
